data.title: 国际服主线Vol.3 第三章前篇更新
data.summary: [Update Preview] Sensei, the first half of Main Story Vol.3 Eden Treaty Ch.3, 'Our Stories' will be
data.body:
[Update Preview]

Sensei, the first half of Main Story Vol.3 Eden Treaty Ch.3, 'Our Stories' will be released on 7/26 (Tue).
After so many obstacles Eden Treaty Signing Ceremony is finally going start to soon, so please stay tuned Sensei!
